ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "department_family" TEXT /* Family of the department to which the transaction belongs */,
  "entity" TEXT /* Entity within the department that incurred the expense */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the expense type */,
  "expense_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the expense area */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "transaction_number" INTEGER /* Unique number assigned to the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction approval (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approver_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the person who approved the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number associated with the transaction */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate used for foreign currency transactions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_entity FOREIGN KEY ("entity") REFERENCES departments ("entity"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_department_family FOREIGN KEY ("department_family") REFERENCES departments ("department_family"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_expense_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_area_id") REFERENCES expense_areas ("expense_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_expense_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_type_id") REFERENCES expense_types ("expense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number of the supplier */,
  "bank_account_details" TEXT /* Bank account details for direct payments */,
  "preferred_currency_id" INTEGER /* Preferred currency for transactions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suppliers_preferred_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_types" (
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense type */,
  "expense_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the expense type (e.g., operational, capital) */,
  "compliance_rules" TEXT /* Compliance rules associated with the expense type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_areas" (
  "expense_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense area */,
  "expense_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense area */,
  "budget_code" TEXT /* Budget code associated with the expense area */,
  "responsible_officer" TEXT /* Officer responsible for the expense area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Current conversion rate to the base currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_family" TEXT /* Family of the department */,
  "entity" TEXT /* Entity within the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department or entity */,
  "budget_allocation" REAL /* Annual budget allocation for the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)
